# AI² (AI Square) — llms.txt
# https://ai2.quaasx108.com

> AI² Hybrid Engine by QUAASX 108 PVT LTD: cite-first classical Ayurveda AI with Sanskrit, transliteration, English, and cross-text grounding.

## Primary

- [Home](https://ai2.quaasx108.com/): Product overview — Ancient Intelligence × Artificial Intelligence
- [Product](https://ai2.quaasx108.com/product): AI² Hybrid Engine capabilities
- [Benchmark](https://ai2.quaasx108.com/benchmark): Bhasha Bench Ayur v1 — 92.8%; validator apply
- [Developers](https://ai2.quaasx108.com/developers): API models (flash, pro, max, GOD)
- [About](https://ai2.quaasx108.com/about): QUAASX 108 PVT LTD

## Product summary

AI² answers Ayurveda questions with classical citations from Charaka Samhita, Sushruta Samhita, Ashtanga Hridayam, Ashtanga Sangraha, Siddhayoga, and Cakradatta. Not medical advice — research assistant with clinical caution.
